title: Best Slay the Spire 2 mods
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
What are the best Slay the Spire 2 mods? The mods for Slay the Spire 1 were so transformative that you can see their influence in the sequel, so we're hoping the new game inspires that same level of creativity.

The majority of the STS 2 mods on offer are things that we fully expect to see added to the Slay the Spire 2 roadmap as we get closer to the full release. There are also several difficulty-related mods in case you find the card game too hard, and we're already seeing new heroes being added to the list of Slay the Spire 2 characters. Join us as we take a closer look at some of the Slay the Spire 2 mods available at this early stage.

Read the rest of the story...
